'''Kariek''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]. Its sole indigenous [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] lifeform were the [[Eickarie]] people, who were divided into various tribes. The Eickaries were a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] race with green and orange skin, with patterns of black scales around their [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and across the back of their heads.

Its [[City/Legends|cities]] were dominated by towering fortresses and watchtowers which were interconnected via a network of underground tunnels.

==History==
[[File:Aurek_7_FB.jpg|thumb|left|150px|[[Unit Aurek-Seven]] on Kariek.]]

The [[Eickarie]] were formerly a fragmented people. Their tribes were involved for centuries in long and disastrous civil wars. But in [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]], the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was invaded and conquered by a mercenary army of [[Lakra]]n led by a mysterious figure known as [[the Warlord]].

The Warlord was defeated in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]] during a [[Capture of the Warlord|joint effort]] by the [[United Tribes of Kariek]] and the [[Empire of the Hand]]. Later, Kariek joined the Empire of the Hand to establish trade and defense ties to ward off potential aggressors.
